raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding American Express dispute XXXX for an XXXX order of mine where the item was damaged in transit and the merchants own carrier marked it damaged and returned to sender left with sender. Originally American Express said they were awaiting credit from the merchant then they changed it and havent resolved in my favor yet. The impartial evidence of ups tracking clearly states it was returned and left with sender. I also sent American Express photos of a live chat I had with XXXX asking them for my money back weeks ago. Apparently merchant lied to American Express and told them I didnt contact them but we caught them in their lie. American Express seems to be favoring merchant here and not closing in my favor despite ample evidence supporting it was RETURNED TO SENDER and I am owed my money back. See ups tracking XXXX.
